mapper.select: select COUNT(commit_id) AS TotalCommit from commit where repo_id = #{repoId};

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.user_name AS userName, u.avatar_url AS userAvatarUrl, COUNT(pr.pr_id) AS mergeRequestCount FROM pr JOIN users u ON pr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pr.repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.name, u.user_name, u.avatar_url ORDER BY prCount DESC
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}) AS totalCommentsAndReplies

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.name AS name, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, IFNULL(SUM(c.comment_count), 0) + IFNULL(SUM(r.reply_count), 0) AS commentCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY user_id ) c ON u.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY user_id ) r ON u.user_id = r.user_id WHERE u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} ) GROUP BY u.user_id, u.user_name, u.name, u.avatar_url ORDER BY commentCount DESC;
